sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75626" key="o)strakeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀστρᾰκ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n75626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">potter,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.191</biblScope> </bibl> (Nicaen.).</sense> </entryFree>
